Created attachment 227073
arcconf.patch

Hi.

I have a problem with building port on FreeBSD 12. Poudriere log:

=>> Ignoring misc/compat12x: is for FreeBSD 13.x and newer
build of misc/compat12x | compat12x-amd64-12.2.1202000.20210406 ended at Tue Aug 10 10:57:38 MSK 2021
build time: 00:00:00                                                                            

This is due to an incorrect installation condition for the COMPAT package.
